name: BTC Deep Value Reclaim v1
thesis: BTC 4h is the best-fit primary lane for testing trend pullback continuation after a deeper value reclaim into structural support, but expressed as a broad repair-of-value rather than a sparse ceremonial reset. The edge should come from repeated flush-and-repair behavior inside a choppy-to-transitional tape.
invalidation_condition: Abort if deeper reclaim setups remain too sparse, if repaired value still mean-reverts without continuation, or if post-reclaim extension is too small after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price overshoots below short-term value, reclaims support, and then extends modestly as balance is restored.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: The live brief still suggests flush-and-repair behavior should appear more often than clean trend continuation. A broader reclaimable pullback should participate more honestly than shallow chase logic or rare collapse patterns.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: BTC 4h is appropriate because reclaim structure is visible and less noisy than on higher-beta alts, while still offering enough movement to test continuation honestly.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the market stays fully rotational, reclaimed support may only bounce to value and fail to continue far enough.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries trade but continuation is shallow, keep the reclaim logic and shorten the back-half exit ambition.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; pullback and reclaim are sequential and broad
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed with moderate reclaim depth instead of rare capitulation requirements
